title: Top 10 Must-See Movies of 2021
description: The article highlights some of the standout movies of 2021, including Dune, The French Dispatch, The Power of the Dog, The Lost Daughter, The Tragedy of Macbeth, No Time to Die, The Green Knight, The Suicide Squad, C'mon C'mon, and The Last Duel. These movies span a variety of genres and styles, from science fiction epics to emotional dramas to action-packed superhero films.

title: Top 10 Global Events of 2021
description: The article summarizes major global events of 2021, including COVID-19 vaccines, Joe Biden's inauguration, the George Floyd verdict, space exploration, climate change action, women's rights, COVID-19 relief, technology advancements, social justice movements, and sports achievements.

title: Winners of the 2021 Oscars
description: Nomadland and its director Chlo� Zhao won big at the 93rd Academy Awards, with Anthony Hopkins and Frances McDormand taking home Best Actor and Best Actress respectively, and Daniel Kaluuya and Yuh-Jung Youn winning Best Supporting Actor and Actress. Other winners included Emerald Fennell for Best Original Screenplay for Promising Young Woman, and Soul for Best Animated Feature and Best Original Score.

title: 2021's Major Movies: Popularity, Ratings, and Awards
description: The article provides an HTML table listing major movies of 2021, including their popularity, ratings, and awards won. The table can be embedded into a website and customized to match the website's design.

title: Oscar Winners 2021: Nomadland, Chlo� Zhao, Anthony Hopkins, Frances McDormand, and More!
description: Nomadland wins Best Picture and Chlo� Zhao becomes the first woman of color to win Best Director at the Oscars. Anthony Hopkins wins Best Actor for The Father, Frances McDormand wins Best Actress for Nomadland, Daniel Kaluuya wins Best Supporting Actor for Judas and the Black Messiah, and Yuh-Jung Youn wins Best Supporting Actress for Minari.
